fields.summary: YARN Service CLI should use hadoop.http.authentication.type to determine authentication method

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description: YARN Service CLI uses REST API in resource manager to control YARN cluster.  The authentication type is currently determined by using isSecurityEnabled, but the code should determine security type based on http authentication type.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
